name: ParallaxBackground
summary: Full-bleed background layer that drifts on scroll for a depth effect; place it inside a `ParallaxScroll` as the backmost layer, and honor reduced-motion (the effect auto-disables) — experimental decorative widget.

props.name: src
props.description: Source for JPG / WEBP / WEBM (auto-detects type if omitted).

props.name: mediaType
props.description: Force media type (otherwise guessed by file extension).

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for an image background. Default `''` (decorative).

props.name: data-valet-component
props.description:
Override the root component-identity marker (defaults to `'ParallaxLayer'`).
ParallaxBackground passes its own name so the DOM node identifies as it.

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`

bestPractices: Parallax layers honor `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`: the scroll-driven displacement collapses to zero, so layers track the page 1:1 (no relative movement) for motion-sensitive users. A video background also drops autoplay under reduced-motion (autoplay is itself motion); the media still renders, only the parallax/autoplay motion is removed.
Give a meaningful image background an `alt`; leave it omitted (default `''`) for purely decorative media.
